Healthcare Website Healthcare 2025 · 5 weeks

A patient-friendly clinic site that doubled bookings.

How Mahavir Clinic moved appointments online and rebuilt patient trust with a modern, mobile-first site.

2.1x
Online bookings
+74%
Organic traffic
1.4s
Mobile LCP
+58%
Local pack visibility

Challenge

An outdated website with confusing navigation, no online booking, and almost zero local SEO presence. Appointments came almost entirely through phone calls, and the brand felt dated next to competitors.

Solution

Rebuilt the site on Next.js with specialty-led information architecture, added Calendly-powered booking, and shipped local SEO, structured data, and a faster mobile experience.

Process

How we shipped it.

  1. 01

    Patient journey mapping

    Mapped how patients actually choose a clinic, from search to booking confirmation.

  2. 02

    IA & UX redesign

    Reorganized the site around specialties and conditions, not internal departments.

  3. 03

    Build & content

    Built on Next.js with clean, accessible UI and rewrote every specialty page for clarity.

  4. 04

    Booking & SEO

    Integrated Calendly, added Schema.org clinic markup, and shipped a local SEO foundation.

  5. 05

    Launch & measurement

    Wired GA4 events for booking funnel, mobile speed monitoring, and monthly reporting.

Tech stack

Built on tools your team can run.

Next.jsTailwindCalendlySchema.orgGA4Vercel

Services delivered

Website DevelopmentSEOUX DesignPerformance

Outcomes

What changed for the business.

  • Better patient engagement across mobile
  • Improved brand perception and trust
  • Accessible booking journey for all age groups
  • Sustained organic growth from local SEO

Inside the build.
